case_title: *** TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY *** NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC. VS. KAMRAN MISAGHI ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT KAMRAN MISAGHI, ANOSHA MISAGHI'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE. NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY. PLAINTIFF SHALL REMIT ALL TRANSFER FEES. DEFENDANT TO RECOVER $1,000 AS REASONABLE FEES. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT REPEATES VERBATIM THE COURTS RULING AND STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Continued To Sep-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KAMRAN MISAGHI, ANOSHA MISAGHI's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE

GRANTED. No opposition filed. The case is transferred to Alameda County. Plaintiff shall remit all transfer fees. Defendant to recover $1,000 as reasonable fees.

Counsel for defendant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order that repeates verbatim the Courts ruling and states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
